scripts._dev_note: Trader removed from `dev` 2026-06-09 — now runs under launchd (com.cockpit.trader, see scripts/launchd/com.cockpit.trader.plist). The `trader` slot in concurrently is now a log-tail of the launchd trader's stdout (does NOT spawn a process). Use `pnpm dev:with-trader` only if launchd is unloaded; the launchd trader.sh singleton check will block accidental duplicates anyway.
scripts.dev: concurrently -n agg,ui,bm,ticks,trader,deploy -c blue,green,magenta,cyan,red,yellow "pnpm --filter @trading/aggregator dev" "pnpm --filter @trading/cockpit dev" "python3 addons/bookmap/addon.py" "pnpm --filter @trading/tick-store dev" "tail -F ~/Library/Logs/cockpit-trader.stdout.log" "bash ~/auto_deploy_tick_addon.sh"
scripts.dev:with-trader: concurrently -n agg,ui,bm,ticks,trader,deploy -c blue,green,magenta,cyan,red,yellow "pnpm --filter @trading/aggregator dev" "pnpm --filter @trading/cockpit dev" "python3 addons/bookmap/addon.py" "pnpm --filter @trading/tick-store dev" "pnpm --filter @trading/trader dev" "bash ~/auto_deploy_tick_addon.sh"
scripts.pm2:restart: pnpm run build:cockpit && pm2 restart aggregator
